headline: Everest Establishes Joseph V. Taranto Scholarship to Advance Commitment to Developing Future Leaders
summary: HAMILTON, Bermuda, May 21, 2026--Everest Group, Ltd. (NYSE: RE) ("Everest"), a global underwriting leader, today announced the inaugural recipient of the Joseph V. Taranto Scholarship, an annual renewable award and part of the company’s broader commitment to expanding opportunity and developing the next generation of leaders.
